revision.comment: 「[[王子神社]]」を「[[王子神社 (東京都北区)]]」へ移動: [[ノート:王子神社]]での議論・合意による
revision.text: #転送 [[王子神社 (東京都北区)]]

'''王子神社'''（おうじじんじゃ）とは、主に八所権現や熊野十二権現など[[九十九王子]]に関連すし現在に至る神社。
;王子神社 * [[王子神社 (東京都北区)]] [[東京都]][[北区 (東京都)|北区]]に所在する神社。旧[[社格]]は[[郷社]]。[[准勅祭社]]、[[東京十社]]。 * [[王子神社 (横浜市緑区)]] [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[緑区 (横浜市)|緑区]]に所在する神社。 * [[王子神社 (新宮市)]] [[和歌山県]][[新宮市]]に所在する神社。浜王子とも呼ばれる。 * [[王子神社 (加西市)]] [[兵庫県]][[加西市]]に所在する神社。 * [[王子神社 (高松市)]] [[香川県]][[高松市]]に所在する神社。 * [[王子神社 (徳島市)]] [[徳島県]][[徳島市]]に所在する神社。 * [[王子神社 (西予市)]] [[愛知県]][[西予市]]に所在する神社。 * [[王子神社 (佐伯市)]] [[大分県]][[佐伯市]]に所在する神社。
;王子神社という名前を含む神社 * [[一王子神社]] [[新潟県]][[新発田市]]に所在する神社。 * [[二王子神社]] 新潟県新発田市に所在する神社。 * [[三王子神社]] 新潟県新発田市に所在する神社。 * [[四王子神社]] [[熊本県]][[玉名郡]][[長洲町]]に所在する神社。 * [[八王子神社 (八王子市)]] 東京都[[八王子市]]に所在する神社。 * [[八王子神社 (恵那市)]] [[岐阜県]][[恵那市]]に所在する神社。 * [[若一王子神社 (大町市)]] [[長野県]][[大町市]]に所在する神社。 * [[若一王子神社 (藍住町)]] 徳島県[[板野郡]][[藍住町]]に所在する神社。 * [[若王子神社]] 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[北区 (神戸市)|北区]]に所在する神社。 * [[熊野若王子神社]] [[京都府]][[京都市]][[左京区]]に所在する神社。 * [[阿倍王子神社]] [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[阿倍野区]]に所在する神社。 * [[切目王子神社]] 和歌山県[[印南町]]に所在する神社。 * [[久保王子神社]] [[島根県]][[邑智郡]][[美郷町]]に所在する神社。 * [[塩屋王子神社]] 和歌山県[[御坊市]]に所在する神社。 * [[堂山王子神社]] [[福島県]][[田村市]]に所在する神社。 * [[福王子神社]] 京都府京都市[[右京区]]に所在する神社。旧社格は[[村社]]
{{aimai}}

revision.text:
'''王子神社'''（おうじじんじゃ）<!--とは、主に熊野十二権現など[[九十九王子]]に関連する神社。代表格は[[浜王子]]からの勧請。-->は[[神社]]。 * [[王子神社 (東京都北区)]]（王子権現） - 東京都[[北区 (東京都)|北区]]に鎮座。[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。[[准勅祭社]]、[[東京十社]]。[[若一王子]]に由来。 * [[王子神社 (横浜市緑区)]] - 神奈川県[[横浜市]][[緑区 (横浜市)|緑区]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (厚木市)]] - 神奈川県[[厚木市]][[王子 (厚木市)|王子]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市)]] - 静岡県[[掛川市]][[山崎 (掛川市)|山崎]]に鎮座。若一王子に由来。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市倉真)]] - 静岡県掛川市[[倉真]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市上内田)]] - 静岡県掛川市[[上内田]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (亀岡市)]]（王子権現） - 京都府[[亀岡市]][[篠町]]王子に鎮座。若一王子に由来。 * [[王子神社 (神戸市灘区)]] - 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[灘区]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (加西市)]] - 兵庫県[[加西市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (高松市)]] - 香川県[[高松市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (徳島市)]] - 徳島県[[徳島市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (石井町)]] - 徳島県[[名東郡]][[石井町]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (西予市)]] - 愛媛県[[西予市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (佐伯市)]] - 大分県[[佐伯市]]に鎮座。
<!-- == 参考 == 「王子神社」という名前を含む神社。 * [[一王子神社]] - [[新潟県]][[新発田市]]に鎮座。 * [[二王子神社]] - 新潟県新発田市に鎮座。 * [[三王子神社]] - 新潟県新発田市に鎮座。 * [[四王子神社]] - [[熊本県]][[玉名郡]][[長洲町]]に鎮座。 * [[八王子神社 (八王子市)]] - 東京都[[八王子市]]に鎮座。 * [[八王子神社 (恵那市)]] - [[岐阜県]][[恵那市]]に鎮座。 * [[若一王子神社 (大町市)]] - [[長野県]][[大町市]]に鎮座。 * [[若一王子神社 (藍住町)]] - 徳島県[[板野郡]][[藍住町]]に鎮座。 * [[若王子神社]] - 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[北区 (神戸市)|北区]]に鎮座。 * [[久保王子神社]] - [[島根県]][[邑智郡]][[美郷町 (島根県)|美郷町]]に鎮座。 * [[堂山王子神社]] - [[福島県]][[田村市]]に鎮座。 * [[福王子神社]] - 京都府京都市[[右京区]]に鎮座。旧社格は[[村社]]。 --> == 関連項目 == * [[皇子神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[若一王子神社]] * [[若一神社]] * [[王子神]] * [[王子村 (曖昧さ回避)]]

'''王子神社'''（おうじじんじゃ）<!--とは、主に熊野十二権現など[[九十九王子]]に関連する神社。代表格は[[浜王子]]からの勧請。-->は[[神社]]。 * [[王子神社 (東京都北区)]]（王子権現） - 東京都[[北区 (東京都)|北区]]に鎮座。[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。[[准勅祭社]]、[[東京十社]]。[[若一王子]]に由来。 * [[王子神社 (横浜市緑区)]] - 神奈川県[[横浜市]][[緑区 (横浜市)|緑区]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (厚木市)]] - 神奈川県[[厚木市]][[王子 (厚木市)|王子]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市)]] - 静岡県[[掛川市]][[山崎 (掛川市)|山崎]]に鎮座。若一王子に由来。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市倉真)]] - 静岡県掛川市[[倉真]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市上内田)]] - 静岡県掛川市[[上内田]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (亀岡市)]]（王子権現） - 京都府[[亀岡市]][[篠町]]王子に鎮座。若一王子に由来。 * [[王子神社 (神戸市灘区)]] - 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[灘区]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (加西市)]] - 兵庫県[[加西市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (高松市)]] - 香川県[[高松市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (徳島市)]] - 徳島県[[徳島市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (石井町)]] - 徳島県[[名東郡]][[石井町]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (西予市)]] - 愛媛県[[西予市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (佐伯市)]] - 大分県[[佐伯市]]に鎮座。
<!-- == 参考 == 「王子神社」という名前を含む神社。 * [[一王子神社]] - [[新潟県]][[新発田市]]に鎮座。 * [[二王子神社]] - 新潟県新発田市に鎮座。 * [[三王子神社]] - 新潟県新発田市に鎮座。 * [[四王子神社]] - [[熊本県]][[玉名郡]][[長洲町]]に鎮座。 * [[八王子神社 (八王子市)]] - 東京都[[八王子市]]に鎮座。 * [[八王子神社 (恵那市)]] - [[岐阜県]][[恵那市]]に鎮座。 * [[若一王子神社 (大町市)]] - [[長野県]][[大町市]]に鎮座。 * [[若一王子神社 (藍住町)]] - 徳島県[[板野郡]][[藍住町]]に鎮座。 * [[若王子神社]] - 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[北区 (神戸市)|北区]]に鎮座。 * [[久保王子神社]] - [[島根県]][[邑智郡]][[美郷町 (島根県)|美郷町]]に鎮座。 * [[堂山王子神社]] - [[福島県]][[田村市]]に鎮座。 * [[福王子神社]] - 京都府京都市[[右京区]]に鎮座。旧社格は[[村社]]。 --> == 関連項目 == * [[皇子神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[若一王子神社]] * [[若一神社]] * [[王子神]] * [[王子村 (曖昧さ回避)]]

'''王子神社'''（おうじじんじゃ）<!--とは、主に熊野十二権現など[[九十九王子]]に関連する神社。代表格は[[浜王子]]からの勧請。-->は[[神社]]。 * [[王子神社 (東京都北区)]]（王子権現） - 東京都[[北区 (東京都)|北区]]に鎮座。[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。[[准勅祭社]]、[[東京十社]]。[[若一王子]]に由来。 * [[王子神社 (横浜市緑区)]] - 神奈川県[[横浜市]][[緑区 (横浜市)|緑区]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (厚木市)]] - 神奈川県[[厚木市]][[王子 (厚木市)|王子]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市)]] - 静岡県[[掛川市]][[山崎 (掛川市)|山崎]]に鎮座。若一王子に由来。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市倉真)]] - 静岡県掛川市[[倉真]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市上内田)]] - 静岡県掛川市[[上内田]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (亀岡市)]]（王子権現） - 京都府[[亀岡市]][[篠町]]王子に鎮座。若一王子に由来。 * [[王子神社 (神戸市灘区)]] - 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[灘区]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (加西市)]] - 兵庫県[[加西市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (高松市)]] - 香川県[[高松市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (徳島市)]] - 徳島県[[徳島市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (石井町)]] - 徳島県[[名東郡]][[石井町]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (西予市)]] - 愛媛県[[西予市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (佐伯市)]] - 大分県[[佐伯市]]に鎮座。
<!-- == 参考 == 「王子神社」という名前を含む神社。 * [[一王子神社]] - [[新潟県]][[新発田市]]に鎮座。 * [[二王子神社]] - 新潟県新発田市に鎮座。 * [[三王子神社]] - 新潟県新発田市に鎮座。 * [[四王子神社]] - [[熊本県]][[玉名郡]][[長洲町]]に鎮座。 * [[八王子神社 (八王子市)]] - 東京都[[八王子市]]に鎮座。 * [[八王子神社 (恵那市)]] - [[岐阜県]][[恵那市]]に鎮座。 * [[若一王子神社 (大町市)]] - [[長野県]][[大町市]]に鎮座。 * [[若一王子神社 (藍住町)]] - 徳島県[[板野郡]][[藍住町]]に鎮座。 * [[若王子神社]] - 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[北区 (神戸市)|北区]]に鎮座。 * [[久保王子神社]] - [[島根県]][[邑智郡]][[美郷町 (島根県)|美郷町]]に鎮座。 * [[堂山王子神社]] - [[福島県]][[田村市]]に鎮座。 * [[福王子神社]] - 京都府京都市[[右京区]]に鎮座。旧社格は[[村社]]。 --> == 関連項目 == * [[皇子神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[若一王子神社]] * [[若一神社]] * [[王子神]] * [[王子村 (曖昧さ回避)]]
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:おうししんしや}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:original pages]] [[ja:王子神社]][[category:kk]] [[Category:熊野信仰]]

* [[王子神社 (東京都北区)]]（王子権現） - 東京都[[北区 (東京都)|北区]]に鎮座。[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。[[准勅祭社]]、[[東京十社]]。[[若一王子]]に由来。 * [[王子神社 (横浜市緑区)]] - 神奈川県[[横浜市]][[緑区 (横浜市)|緑区]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (厚木市)]] - 神奈川県[[厚木市]][[王子 (厚木市)|王子]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市)]] - 静岡県[[掛川市]][[山崎 (掛川市)|山崎]]に鎮座。若一王子に由来。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市倉真)]] - 静岡県掛川市[[倉真]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市上内田)]] - 静岡県掛川市[[上内田]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (南伊豆町)]] - 静岡県[[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (亀岡市)]]（王子権現） - 京都府[[亀岡市]][[篠町]]王子に鎮座。若一王子に由来。 * [[王子神社 (神戸市灘区)]] - 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[灘区]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (加西市)]] - 兵庫県[[加西市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (高松市)]] - 香川県[[高松市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (徳島市)]] - 徳島県[[徳島市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (石井町)]] - 徳島県[[名東郡]][[石井町]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (西予市)]] - 愛媛県[[西予市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (佐伯市)]] - 大分県[[佐伯市]]に鎮座。
<!-- == 参考 == 「王子神社」という名前を含む神社。 * [[一王子神社]] - [[新潟県]][[新発田市]]に鎮座。 * [[二王子神社]] - 新潟県新発田市に鎮座。 * [[三王子神社]] - 新潟県新発田市に鎮座。 * [[四王子神社]] - [[熊本県]][[玉名郡]][[長洲町]]に鎮座。 * [[八王子神社 (八王子市)]] - 東京都[[八王子市]]に鎮座。 * [[八王子神社 (恵那市)]] - [[岐阜県]][[恵那市]]に鎮座。 * [[若一王子神社 (大町市)]] - [[長野県]][[大町市]]に鎮座。 * [[若一王子神社 (藍住町)]] - 徳島県[[板野郡]][[藍住町]]に鎮座。 * [[若王子神社]] - 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[北区 (神戸市)|北区]]に鎮座。 * [[久保王子神社]] - [[島根県]][[邑智郡]][[美郷町 (島根県)|美郷町]]に鎮座。 * [[堂山王子神社]] - [[福島県]][[田村市]]に鎮座。 * [[福王子神社]] - 京都府京都市[[右京区]]に鎮座。旧社格は[[村社]]。 --> == 関連項目 == * [[皇子神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[若一王子神社]] * [[若一神社]] * [[王子神]] * [[王子村 (曖昧さ回避)]]

'''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}}.
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kita, Tokyo)|ja|王子神社 (東京都北区)}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kita City, Tokyo|ja|北区 (東京都)}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine|ja|王子神社 (東京都北区)}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kita City, Tokyo|ja|北区 (東京都)}}. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)}} – Located in {{ill|Midori Ward, Yokohama|ja|緑区 (横浜市)}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)}} – Located in {{ill|Atsugi, Kanagawa|ja|厚木市}} (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市倉真)}} – Located in {{ill|Kurama, Kakegawa|ja|倉真}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市上内田)}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|ja|上内田}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|王子神社 (亀岡市)}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kameoka City|ja|亀岡市}}, {{ill|Shino Town|ja|篠町}}, Kameoka. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|ja|王子神社 (神戸市灘区)}} – Located in {{ill|Nada Ward, Kobe|ja|灘区 (神戸市)}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyogo)|ja|王子神社 (加西市)}} – Located in {{ill|Kasai City|ja|加西市}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja|王子神社 (高松市)}} – Located in {{ill|Takamatsu City|ja|高松市}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|王子神社 (徳島市)}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|ja|王子神社 (石井町)}} – Located in {{ill|Ishii Town, Myōdō District|ja|名東郡石井町}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|ja|王子神社 (西予市)}} – Located in {{ill|Seiyo City|ja|西予市}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|ja|王子神社 (佐伯市)}} – Located in {{ill|Saiki City|ja|佐伯市}}.
<!-- == Reference == Shrines with the name "Ōji Shrine": * {{ill|Ichioji Shrine|ja|一王子神社}} – Located in {{ill|Shibata City, Niigata|ja|新発田市}}, {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|ja|新潟県}}. * {{ill|Nioji Shrine|ja|二王子神社}} – Located in Shibata City, Niigata. * {{ill|San'ōji Shrine|ja|三王子神社}} – Located in Shibata City, Niigata. * {{ill|Shioji Shrine (Kumamoto)|ja|四王子神社}} – Located in {{ill|Nagasu Town, Tamana District|ja|玉名郡長洲町}}, {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|ja|熊本県}}. * {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Hachioji)|ja|八王子神社 (八王子市)}} – Located in {{ill|Hachioji City|ja|八王子市}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}. * {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Ena)|ja|八王子神社 (恵那市)}} – Located in {{ill|Ena City|ja|恵那市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}. * {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji Shrine (Ōmachi)|ja|若一王子神社 (大町市)}} – Located in {{ill|Ōmachi City|ja|大町市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji Shrine (Aizumi)|ja|若一王子神社 (藍住町)}} – Located in {{ill|Aizumi Town|ja|藍住町}}, {{ill|Itano District|ja|板野郡}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Wakaōji Shrine|ja|若王子神社}} – Located in {{ill|Kita Ward, Kobe|ja|北区 (神戸市)}}, {{ill|Kobe City|ja|神戸市}}, {{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}. * {{ill|Kubo Ōji Shrine|ja|久保王子神社}} – Located in {{ill|Misato Town, Ōchi District|ja|邑智郡美郷町}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県}}. * {{ill|Dōyama Ōji Shrine|ja|堂山王子神社}} – Located in {{ill|Tamura City|ja|田村市}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}}. * {{ill|Fukuōji Shrine|ja|福王子神社}} – Located in {{ill|Ukyo Ward, Kyoto|ja|右京区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. Former village shrine. -->
== Oji Shrine (皇子神社) ==
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Anan)|ja|皇子神社 (阿南市)}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Anan City|ja|阿南市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu City)|ja|皇子神社 (高松市)}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Takamatsu City|ja|高松市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Marugame City)|ja|皇子神社 (丸亀市)}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Marugame City|ja|丸亀市}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Shōdoshima Town)|ja|皇子神社 (小豆島町)}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Shōdoshima Town|ja|小豆島町}}, {{ill|Shōzu District|ja|小豆郡}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県}}.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Nyakuichiōji Shrine|ja|若一王子神社}} * {{ill|Wakaichi Shrine|ja|若一神社}} * {{ill|Ōji no Kami|ja|王子神}} * {{ill|Ōji Village (Disambiguation)|ja|王子村 (曖昧さ回避)}}

revision.text:
'''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}}.
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine|ja|王子神社 (東京都北区)}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kita City, Tokyo|ja|北区 (東京都)}}. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)}} – Located in {{ill|Midori Ward, Yokohama|ja|緑区 (横浜市)}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)}} – Located in {{ill|Atsugi, Kanagawa|ja|厚木市}} (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市倉真)}} – Located in {{ill|Kurama, Kakegawa|ja|倉真}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市上内田)}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|ja|上内田}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|王子神社 (亀岡市)}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kameoka City|ja|亀岡市}}, {{ill|Shino Town|ja|篠町}}, Kameoka. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|ja|王子神社 (神戸市灘区)}} – Located in {{ill|Nada Ward, Kobe|ja|灘区 (神戸市)}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyogo)|ja|王子神社 (加西市)}} – Located in {{ill|Kasai City|ja|加西市}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja|王子神社 (高松市)}} – Located in {{ill|Takamatsu City|ja|高松市}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|王子神社 (徳島市)}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|ja|王子神社 (石井町)}} – Located in {{ill|Ishii Town, Myōdō District|ja|名東郡石井町}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|ja|王子神社 (西予市)}} – Located in {{ill|Seiyo City|ja|西予市}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|ja|王子神社 (佐伯市)}} – Located in {{ill|Saiki City|ja|佐伯市}}.
<!-- == Reference == Shrines with the name "Ōji Shrine": * {{ill|Ichioji Shrine|ja|一王子神社}} – Located in {{ill|Shibata City, Niigata|ja|新発田市}}, {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|ja|新潟県}}. * {{ill|Nioji Shrine|ja|二王子神社}} – Located in Shibata City, Niigata. * {{ill|San'ōji Shrine|ja|三王子神社}} – Located in Shibata City, Niigata. * {{ill|Shioji Shrine (Kumamoto)|ja|四王子神社}} – Located in {{ill|Nagasu Town, Tamana District|ja|玉名郡長洲町}}, {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|ja|熊本県}}. * {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Hachioji)|ja|八王子神社 (八王子市)}} – Located in {{ill|Hachioji City|ja|八王子市}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}. * {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Ena)|ja|八王子神社 (恵那市)}} – Located in {{ill|Ena City|ja|恵那市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}. * {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji Shrine (Ōmachi)|ja|若一王子神社 (大町市)}} – Located in {{ill|Ōmachi City|ja|大町市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. * {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji Shrine (Aizumi)|ja|若一王子神社 (藍住町)}} – Located in {{ill|Aizumi Town|ja|藍住町}}, {{ill|Itano District|ja|板野郡}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Wakaōji Shrine|ja|若王子神社}} – Located in {{ill|Kita Ward, Kobe|ja|北区 (神戸市)}}, {{ill|Kobe City|ja|神戸市}}, {{ill|Hyogo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}. * {{ill|Kubo Ōji Shrine|ja|久保王子神社}} – Located in {{ill|Misato Town, Ōchi District|ja|邑智郡美郷町}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県}}. * {{ill|Dōyama Ōji Shrine|ja|堂山王子神社}} – Located in {{ill|Tamura City|ja|田村市}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}}. * {{ill|Fukuōji Shrine|ja|福王子神社}} – Located in {{ill|Ukyo Ward, Kyoto|ja|右京区}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. '''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}}.
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine|ja|王子神社 (東京都北区)}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kita City, Tokyo|ja|北区 (東京都)}}. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)}} – Located in {{ill|Midori Ward, Yokohama|ja|緑区 (横浜市)}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)}} – Located in {{ill|Atsugi, Kanagawa|ja|厚木市}} (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市倉真)}} – Located in {{ill|Kurama, Kakegawa|ja|倉真}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市上内田)}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|ja|上内田}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|王子神社 (亀岡市)}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kameoka City|ja|亀岡市}}, {{ill|Shino Town|ja|篠町}}, Kameoka. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|ja|王子神社 (神戸市灘区)}} – Located in {{ill|Nada Ward, Kobe|ja|灘区 (神戸市)}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyogo)|ja|王子神社 (加西市)}} – Located in {{ill|Kasai City|ja|加西市}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja|王子神社 (高松市)}} – Located in {{ill|Takamatsu City|ja|高松市}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|王子神社 (徳島市)}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|ja|王子神社 (石井町)}} – Located in {{ill|Ishii Town, Myōdō District|ja|名東郡石井町}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|ja|王子神社 (西予市)}} – Located in {{ill|Seiyo City|ja|西予市}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|ja|王子神社 (佐伯市)}} – Located in {{ill|Saiki City|ja|佐伯市}}.

'''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}}.
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine|ja|王子神社 (東京都北区)|12=draft}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kita City, Tokyo|ja|北区 (東京都)|12=draft}}. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|12=draft}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|12=draft}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Midori Ward, Yokohama|ja|緑区 (横浜市)|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Atsugi, Kanagawa|ja|厚木市|12=draft}} (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)|12=draft}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市倉真)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kurama, Kakegawa|ja|倉真|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市上内田)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|ja|上内田|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|王子神社 (亀岡市)|12=draft}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kameoka City|ja|亀岡市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Shino Town|ja|篠町|12=draft}}, Kameoka. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|ja|王子神社 (神戸市灘区)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Nada Ward, Kobe|ja|灘区 (神戸市)|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyogo)|ja|王子神社 (加西市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kasai City|ja|加西市|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja|王子神社 (高松市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Takamatsu City|ja|高松市|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|王子神社 (徳島市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|ja|王子神社 (石井町)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Ishii Town, Myōdō District|ja|名東郡石井町|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|ja|王子神社 (西予市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Seiyo City|ja|西予市|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|ja|王子神社 (佐伯市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Saiki City|ja|佐伯市|12=draft}}.

'''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}}.
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine|ja|王子神社 (東京都北区)|12=draft}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kita City, Tokyo|ja|北区 (東京都)|12=draft}}. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|12=draft}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|12=draft}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|12=draft}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Midori Ward, Yokohama|ja|緑区 (横浜市)|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Atsugi, Kanagawa|ja|厚木市|12=draft}} (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)|12=draft}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市倉真)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kurama, Kakegawa|ja|倉真|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市上内田)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|ja|上内田|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|王子神社 (亀岡市)|12=draft}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kameoka City|ja|亀岡市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Shino Town|ja|篠町|12=draft}}, Kameoka. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|ja|王子神社 (神戸市灘区)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Nada Ward, Kobe|ja|灘区 (神戸市)|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyogo)|ja|王子神社 (加西市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kasai City|ja|加西市|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja|王子神社 (高松市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Takamatsu City|ja|高松市|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|王子神社 (徳島市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|ja|王子神社 (石井町)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Ishii Town, Myōdō District|ja|名東郡石井町|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|ja|王子神社 (西予市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Seiyo City|ja|西予市|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|ja|王子神社 (佐伯市)|12=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Saiki City|ja|佐伯市|12=draft}}.

Former village shrine. -->
== Oji Shrine (皇子神社) ==
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Anan)|ja|皇子神社 (阿南市)|12=draft}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Anan City|ja|阿南市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu City)|ja|皇子神社 (高松市)|12=draft}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Takamatsu City|ja|高松市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Marugame City)|ja|皇子神社 (丸亀市)|12=draft}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Marugame City|ja|丸亀市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Shōdoshima Town)|ja|皇子神社 (小豆島町)|12=draft}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Shōdoshima Town|ja|小豆島町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Shōzu District|ja|小豆郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県|12=draft}}.

'''王子神社'''（おうじじんじゃ）<!--とは、主に熊野十二権現など[[九十九王子]]に関連する神社。代表格は[[浜王子]]からの勧請。-->は[[神社]]。
* [[王子神社 (東京都北区)]]（王子権現） - 東京都[[北区 (東京都)|北区]]に鎮座。[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。[[准勅祭社]]、[[東京十社]]。[[若一王子]]に由来。 * [[王子神社 (横浜市緑区)]] - 神奈川県[[横浜市]][[緑区 (横浜市)|緑区]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (厚木市)]] - 神奈川県[[厚木市]][[王子 (厚木市)|王子]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市)]] - 静岡県[[掛川市]][[山崎 (掛川市)|山崎]]に鎮座。若一王子に由来。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市倉真)]] - 静岡県掛川市[[倉真]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市上内田)]] - 静岡県掛川市[[上内田]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (南伊豆町)]] - 静岡県[[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (亀岡市)]]（王子権現） - 京都府[[亀岡市]][[篠町]]王子に鎮座。若一王子に由来。 * [[王子神社 (神戸市灘区)]] - 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[灘区]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (加西市)]] - 兵庫県[[加西市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (高松市)]] - 香川県[[高松市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (徳島市)]] - 徳島県[[徳島市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (石井町)]] - 徳島県[[名東郡]][[石井町]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (西予市)]] - 愛媛県[[西予市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (佐伯市)]] - 大分県[[佐伯市]]に鎮座。
<!-- == 参考 == 「王子神社」という名前を含む神社。 * [[一王子神社]] - [[新潟県]][[新発田市]]に鎮座。 * [[二王子神社]] - 新潟県新発田市に鎮座。 * [[三王子神社]] - 新潟県新発田市に鎮座。 * [[四王子神社]] - [[熊本県]][[玉名郡]][[長洲町]]に鎮座。 * [[八王子神社 (八王子市)]] - 東京都[[八王子市]]に鎮座。 * [[八王子神社 (恵那市)]] - [[岐阜県]][[恵那市]]に鎮座。 * [[若一王子神社 (大町市)]] - [[長野県]][[大町市]]に鎮座。 * [[若一王子神社 (藍住町)]] - 徳島県[[板野郡]][[藍住町]]に鎮座。 * [[若王子神社]] - 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[北区 (神戸市)|北区]]に鎮座。 * [[久保王子神社]] - [[島根県]][[邑智郡]][[美郷町 (島根県)|美郷町]]に鎮座。 * [[堂山王子神社]] - [[福島県]][[田村市]]に鎮座。 * [[福王子神社]] - 京都府京都市[[右京区]]に鎮座。旧社格は[[村社]]。 --> == 関連項目 == * [[皇子神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[若一王子神社]] * [[若一神社]] * [[王子神]] * [[王子村 (曖昧さ回避)]]
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:おうししんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]] [[Category:熊野信仰]]

'''王子神社'''（おうじじんじゃ）<!--とは、主に熊野十二権現など[[九十九王子]]に関連する神社。代表格は[[浜王子]]からの勧請。-->は[[神社]]。
* [[王子神社 (東京都北区)]]（王子権現） - 東京都[[北区 (東京都)|北区]]に鎮座。[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。[[准勅祭社]]、[[東京十社]]。[[若一王子]]に由来。 * [[王子神社 (横浜市緑区)]] - 神奈川県[[横浜市]][[緑区 (横浜市)|緑区]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (厚木市)]] - 神奈川県[[厚木市]][[王子 (厚木市)|王子]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市)]] - 静岡県[[掛川市]][[山崎 (掛川市)|山崎]]に鎮座。若一王子に由来。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市倉真)]] - 静岡県掛川市[[倉真]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (掛川市上内田)]] - 静岡県掛川市[[上内田]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (南伊豆町)]] - 静岡県[[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (亀岡市)]]（王子権現） - 京都府[[亀岡市]][[篠町]]王子に鎮座。若一王子に由来。 * [[王子神社 (神戸市灘区)]] - 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[灘区]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (加西市)]] - 兵庫県[[加西市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (高松市)]] - 香川県[[高松市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (徳島市)]] - 徳島県[[徳島市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (石井町)]] - 徳島県[[名東郡]][[石井町]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (西予市)]] - 愛媛県[[西予市]]に鎮座。 * [[王子神社 (佐伯市)]] - 大分県[[佐伯市]]に鎮座。
<!-- == 参考 == 「王子神社」という名前を含む神社。 * [[一王子神社]] - [[新潟県]][[新発田市]]に鎮座。 * [[二王子神社]] - 新潟県新発田市に鎮座。 * [[三王子神社]] - 新潟県新発田市に鎮座。 * [[四王子神社]] - [[熊本県]][[玉名郡]][[長洲町]]に鎮座。 * [[八王子神社 (八王子市)]] - 東京都[[八王子市]]に鎮座。 * [[八王子神社 (恵那市)]] - [[岐阜県]][[恵那市]]に鎮座。 * [[若一王子神社 (大町市)]] - [[長野県]][[大町市]]に鎮座。 * [[若一王子神社 (藍住町)]] - 徳島県[[板野郡]][[藍住町]]に鎮座。 * [[若王子神社]] - 兵庫県[[神戸市]][[北区 (神戸市)|北区]]に鎮座。 * [[久保王子神社]] - [[島根県]][[邑智郡]][[美郷町 (島根県)|美郷町]]に鎮座。 * [[堂山王子神社]] - [[福島県]][[田村市]]に鎮座。 * [[福王子神社]] - 京都府京都市[[右京区]]に鎮座。旧社格は[[村社]]。 --> == 関連項目 == * [[皇子神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[若一王子神社]] * [[若一神社]] * [[王子神]] * [[王子村 (曖昧さ回避)]]

revision.text:
'''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine|ja|王子神社 (東京都北区)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kita City, Tokyo|ja|北区 (東京都)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Midori Ward, Yokohama|ja|緑区 (横浜市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Atsugi, Kanagawa|ja|厚木市|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市倉真)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kurama, Kakegawa|ja|倉真|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市上内田)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|ja|上内田|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|王子神社 (亀岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kameoka City|ja|亀岡市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Shino Town|ja|篠町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Kameoka. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|ja|王子神社 (神戸市灘区)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Nada Ward, Kobe|ja|灘区 (神戸市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyogo)|ja|王子神社 (加西市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kasai City|ja|加西市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja|王子神社 (高松市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Takamatsu City|ja|高松市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|王子神社 (徳島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|ja|王子神社 (石井町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Ishii Town, Myōdō District|ja|名東郡石井町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|ja|王子神社 (西予市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Seiyo City|ja|西予市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|ja|王子神社 (佐伯市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Saiki City|ja|佐伯市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Oji Shrine (皇子神社) ==
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Anan)|ja|皇子神社 (阿南市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Anan City|ja|阿南市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu City)|ja|皇子神社 (高松市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Takamatsu City|ja|高松市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Marugame City)|ja|皇子神社 (丸亀市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Marugame City|ja|丸亀市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Shōdoshima Town)|ja|皇子神社 (小豆島町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Shōdoshima Town|ja|小豆島町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Shōzu District|ja|小豆郡|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.

'''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine|ja|王子神社 (東京都北区)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kita City, Tokyo|ja|北区 (東京都)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Midori Ward, Yokohama|ja|緑区 (横浜市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Atsugi, Kanagawa|ja|厚木市|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市倉真)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kurama, Kakegawa|ja|倉真|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市上内田)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|ja|上内田|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|王子神社 (亀岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kameoka City|ja|亀岡市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Shino Town|ja|篠町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Kameoka. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|ja|王子神社 (神戸市灘区)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Nada Ward, Kobe|ja|灘区 (神戸市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyogo)|ja|王子神社 (加西市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Kasai City|ja|加西市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja|王子神社 (高松市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Takamatsu City|ja|高松市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|王子神社 (徳島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|ja|王子神社 (石井町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Ishii Town, Myōdō District|ja|名東郡石井町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|ja|王子神社 (西予市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Seiyo City|ja|西予市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|ja|王子神社 (佐伯市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Located in {{ill|Saiki City|ja|佐伯市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.

'''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrine|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine|ja|王子神社 (東京都北区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine|qq=}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kita City, Tokyo|ja|北区 (東京都)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita City, Tokyo|qq=}}. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jun-chokusai Shrine|qq=}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Ten Shrines|qq=}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Midori Ward, Yokohama|ja|緑区 (横浜市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Midori Ward, Yokohama|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Atsugi, Kanagawa|ja|厚木市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atsugi, Kanagawa|qq=}} (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki, Kakegawa|qq=}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市倉真)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kurama, Kakegawa|ja|倉真|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurama, Kakegawa|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市上内田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|ja|上内田|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|王子神社 (亀岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|qq=}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kameoka City|ja|亀岡市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kameoka City|qq=}}, {{ill|Shino Town|ja|篠町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shino Town|qq=}}, Kameoka. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|ja|王子神社 (神戸市灘区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Nada Ward, Kobe|ja|灘区 (神戸市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nada Ward, Kobe|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyogo)|ja|王子神社 (加西市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyogo)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Kasai City|ja|加西市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasai City|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja|王子神社 (高松市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Takamatsu City|ja|高松市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu City|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|王子神社 (徳島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokushima City|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|ja|王子神社 (石井町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Ishii Town, Myōdō District|ja|名東郡石井町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishii Town, Myōdō District|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|ja|王子神社 (西予市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Seiyo City|ja|西予市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiyo City|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|ja|王子神社 (佐伯市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Saiki City|ja|佐伯市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiki City|qq=}}.
== Oji Shrine (皇子神社) ==
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Anan)|ja|皇子神社 (阿南市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Anan)|qq=}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Anan City|ja|阿南市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anan City|qq=}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokushima Prefecture|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu City)|ja|皇子神社 (高松市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu City)|qq=}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Takamatsu City|ja|高松市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu City|qq=}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagawa Prefecture|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Marugame City)|ja|皇子神社 (丸亀市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Marugame City)|qq=}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Marugame City|ja|丸亀市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marugame City|qq=}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagawa Prefecture|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Shōdoshima Town)|ja|皇子神社 (小豆島町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Shōdoshima Town)|qq=}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Shōdoshima Town|ja|小豆島町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōdoshima Town|qq=}}, {{ill|Shōzu District|ja|小豆郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōzu District|qq=}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|ja|香川県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagawa Prefecture|qq=}}.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Nyakuichi Ōji Shrine|ja|若一王子神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyakuichi Ōji Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakaichi Shrine|ja|若一神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Ōji no Kami|ja|王子神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji no Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Ōji Village (Disambiguation)|ja|王子村 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Village (Disambiguation)|qq=}}

'''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrine|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine|ja|王子神社 (東京都北区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine|qq=}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in {{ill|Kita City, Tokyo|ja|北区 (東京都)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita City, Tokyo|qq=}}. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jun-chokusai Shrine|qq=}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Ten Shrines|qq=}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Midori Ward, Yokohama|ja|緑区 (横浜市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Midori Ward, Yokohama|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Atsugi, Kanagawa|ja|厚木市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atsugi, Kanagawa|qq=}} (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki, Kakegawa|qq=}}. '''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]].
* [[:en:Ōji Shrine|Ōji Shrine]] (Ōji Gongen) – Located in [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita City, Tokyo]]. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jun-chokusai Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東京十社}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Ten Shrines|qq=}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Midori-ku, Yokohama|Midori Ward, Yokohama]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi, Kanagawa]] (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki, Kakegawa|qq=}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市倉真)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kurama, Kakegawa|ja|倉真|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurama, Kakegawa|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市上内田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|ja|上内田|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|王子神社 (亀岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in [[:en:Kameoka, Kyoto|Kameoka City]], {{ill|Shino Town|ja|篠町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shino Town|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Kameoka. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|ja|王子神社 (神戸市灘区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Nada Ward, Kobe|ja|灘区 (神戸市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nada Ward, Kobe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyōgo)|ja|王子神社 (加西市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyōgo)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kasai, Hyōgo|Kasai City]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja|王子神社 (高松市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Takamatsu|Takamatsu City]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|王子神社 (徳島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Tokushima (city)|Tokushima City]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|ja|王子神社 (石井町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Ishii Town, Myōdō District|ja|名東郡石井町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishii Town, Myōdō District|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|ja|王子神社 (西予市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Seiyo, Ehime|Seiyo City]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|ja|王子神社 (佐伯市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Saiki, Ōita|Saiki City]].
== Oji Shrine (皇子神社) ==
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Anan)|ja|皇子神社 (阿南市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Anan)|qq=}} - A shrine located in [[:en:Anan, Tokushima|Anan City]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu City)|ja|皇子神社 (高松市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A shrine located in [[:en:Takamatsu|Takamatsu City]], [[:en:Kagawa Prefecture|Kagawa Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Marugame City)|ja|皇子神社 (丸亀市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Marugame City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A shrine located in [[:en:Marugame, Kagawa|Marugame City]], [[:en:Kagawa Prefecture|Kagawa Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Shōdoshima Town)|ja|皇子神社 (小豆島町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Shōdoshima Town)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A shrine located in [[:en:Shōdoshima, Kagawa|Shōdoshima Town]], [[:en:Shōzu District, Kagawa|Shōzu District]], [[:en:Kagawa Prefecture|Kagawa Prefecture]].
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Nyakuichi Ōji Shrine|ja|若一王子神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyakuichi Ōji Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakaichi Shrine|ja|若一神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Ōji no Kami|ja|王子神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji no Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Ōji Village (Disambiguation)|ja|王子村 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Village (Disambiguation)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 王子村}}

'''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]].
* [[:en:Ōji Shrine|Ōji Shrine]] (Ōji Gongen) – Located in [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita City, Tokyo]]. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#District_shrine|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jun-chokusai Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東京十社}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Ten Shrines|qq=}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市倉真)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kurama, Kakegawa|ja|倉真|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurama, Kakegawa|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市上内田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|ja|上内田|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|王子神社 (亀岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in [[:en:Kameoka, Kyoto|Kameoka City]], {{ill|Shino Town|ja|篠町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shino Town|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Kameoka. {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11573001]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11573001]] Wikidata name: [[Category:Add wikidata]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]].
* [[:en:Ōji Shrine|Ōji Shrine]] (Ōji Gongen) – Located in [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita City, Tokyo]]. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jun-chokusai Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東京十社|1=Tokyo Ten Shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q164895}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Ten Shrines|qq=}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=|1=Nyakuichi Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616186}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|qq=|1=Ōji-jinja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594812}} – Located in [[:en:Midori-ku, Yokohama|Midori Ward, Yokohama]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi, Kanagawa]] (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|qq=|1=Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11573003}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki, Kakegawa|qq=|1=Yamazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131850909}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=|1=Nyakuichi Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616186}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市倉真)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kurama, Kakegawa|ja|倉真|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurama, Kakegawa|qq=|1=Kurami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11386918}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市上内田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|ja|上内田|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|王子神社 (亀岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in [[:en:Kameoka, Kyoto|Kameoka City]], {{ill|Shino Town|ja|篠町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shino Town|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Kameoka. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=|1=Nyakuichi Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616186}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|ja|王子神社 (神戸市灘区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Nada Ward, Kobe|ja|灘区 (神戸市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nada Ward, Kobe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyōgo)|ja|王子神社 (加西市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyōgo)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kasai, Hyōgo|Kasai City]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja|王子神社 (高松市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Takamatsu|Takamatsu City]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|王子神社 (徳島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Tokushima (city)|Tokushima City]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|ja|王子神社 (石井町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Ishii Town, Myōdō District|ja|名東郡石井町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishii Town, Myōdō District|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|ja|王子神社 (西予市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Seiyo, Ehime|Seiyo City]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|ja|王子神社 (佐伯市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Saiki, Ōita|Saiki City]].
== Oji Shrine (皇子神社) ==
* {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Anan)|ja|皇子神社 (阿南市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Anan)|qq=}} - A shrine located in [[:en:Anan, Tokushima|Anan City]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu City)|ja|皇子神社 (高松市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A shrine located in [[:en:Takamatsu|Takamatsu City]], [[:en:Kagawa Prefecture|Kagawa Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Marugame City)|ja|皇子神社 (丸亀市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Marugame City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A shrine located in [[:en:Marugame, Kagawa|Marugame City]], [[:en:Kagawa Prefecture|Kagawa Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Shōdoshima Town)|ja|皇子神社 (小豆島町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Shōdoshima Town)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A shrine located in [[:en:Shōdoshima, Kagawa|Shōdoshima Town]], [[:en:Shōzu District, Kagawa|Shōzu District]], [[:en:Kagawa Prefecture|Kagawa Prefecture]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11573001]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]].
* [[:en:Ōji Shrine|Ōji Shrine]] (Ōji Gongen) – Located in [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita City, Tokyo]]. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jun-chokusai Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東京十社|1=Tokyo Ten Shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q164895}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Ten Shrines|qq=}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=|1=Nyakuichi Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616186}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|qq=|1=Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594812}} – Located in [[:en:Midori-ku, Yokohama|Midori Ward, Yokohama]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi, Kanagawa]] (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|qq=|1=Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11573003}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki, Kakegawa|qq=|1=Yamazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131850909}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=|1=Nyakuichi Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616186}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市倉真)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kurama, Kakegawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kurama, Kakegawa|ja|倉真|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurama, Kakegawa|qq=|1=Kurami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11386918}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市上内田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kamiuchida, Kakegawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|ja|上内田|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamiuchida, Kakegawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|王子神社 (亀岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kameoka)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ōji Gongen) – Located in [[:en:Kameoka, Kyoto|Kameoka City]], {{ill|Shino Town|ja|篠町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shino Town|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Kameoka. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|qq=|1=Nyakuichi Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616186}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|ja|王子神社 (神戸市灘区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Nada, Kobe)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Nada Ward, Kobe|ja|灘区 (神戸市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nada Ward, Kobe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyōgo)|ja|王子神社 (加西市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Kasai, Hyōgo)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Kasai, Hyōgo|Kasai City]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja|王子神社 (高松市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Takamatsu)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Takamatsu|Takamatsu City]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|王子神社 (徳島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Tokushima City)|qq=}} – Located in [[:en:Tokushima (city)|Tokushima City]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|ja|王子神社 (石井町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Ishii, Tokushima)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Ishii Town, Myōdō District|ja|名東郡石井町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishii Town, Myōdō District|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|ja|王子神社 (西予市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Seiyo, Ehime)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Seiyo, Ehime|Seiyo City]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|ja|王子神社 (佐伯市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Saiki, Oita)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Saiki, Ōita|Saiki City]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11573001]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]].
* [[:en:Ōji Shrine|Ōji Shrine]] (Ōji Gongen) – Located in [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita City, Tokyo]]. * [[:en:Ōji Shrine|Ōji Shrine]] (Ōji Gongen) – Located in [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita City, Tokyo]]. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:王子神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:王子神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:王子神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11573001]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]].
* [[:en:Ōji Shrine|Ōji Shrine]] (Ōji Gongen) – Located in [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita City, Tokyo]]. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東京十社|1=Tokyo Ten Shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q164895}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Ten Shrines|qq=}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|1=Nyakuichi Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616186}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|1=Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594812}} – Located in [[:en:Midori-ku, Yokohama|Midori Ward, Yokohama]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi, Kanagawa]] (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|1=Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11573003}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki, Kakegawa|1=Yamazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131850909}}. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:王子神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:王子神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:王子神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11573001]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōji Shrine''' (王子神社, Ōji Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]].
* [[:en:Ōji Shrine|Ōji Shrine]] (Ōji Gongen) – Located in [[:en:Kita, Tokyo|Kita City, Tokyo]]. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東京十社|1=Tokyo Ten Shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q164895}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Ten Shrines|qq=}}. Associated with {{ill|Wakaichi Ōji|ja|若一王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaichi Ōji|1=Nyakuichi Ōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616186}}. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|ja|王子神社 (横浜市緑区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Midori, Yokohama)|1=Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q43594812}} – Located in [[:en:Midori-ku, Yokohama|Midori Ward, Yokohama]]. * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja|王子神社 (厚木市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Atsugi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi, Kanagawa]] (Ōji, Atsugi). * {{ill|Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|ja|王子神社 (掛川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji Shrine (Yamasaki, Kakegawa)|1=Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11573003}} – Located in {{ill|Yamasaki, Kakegawa|ja|山崎 (掛川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamasaki, Kakegawa|1=Yamazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131850909}}. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|WD=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東京十社|1=Tokyo Ten Shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q164895}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Ten Shrines|qq=}}. Former {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|WD=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}, {{ill|Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja|准勅祭社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jun-chokusai Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東京十社|1=Tokyo Ten Shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q164895}}, and part of the {{ill|Tokyo Ten Shrines|ja|東京十社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Ten Shrines|qq=}}.
